base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of donut_plains_variants — a tile from 1992 super mario kart. Donut Plains 1-3 (asset IDs 6875/81336/81337) — donut-shaped flat tracks. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
